title: Playground Register
concept: A minimal expert toolbar and table-led register for power users managing many saved Playgrounds, where creation, import, export, saving, and Site Manager actions are exposed through compact command menus and row inspectors instead of large onboarding panels.
focus: compact command menus with keyboard-like affordances
neutral WordPress admin-inspired palette with one blue accent
row inspector for source, storage, runtime, and artifact commands
flows: Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from the first viewport table with open, rename, delete, save, local directory save, zip download, and export commands.
Start a new Playground from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or imported zip through compact toolbar menus and register rows.
Use Site Manager sections for settings, file browser, Blueprint bundle, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, GitHub export, and zip download.
Browse the Blueprint gallery with category filters and featured entries while preserving access to all 43 blueprints.
Navigate and refresh the active embedded WordPress page from the persistent path command bar.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
